steps.assistant_text: Switch dispatcher, 93.3%->exact. (3) v0/v1 web flip by PSEUDO-CREATION ORDER: define base FIRST from the full expr *(char**)(obj+0xB4)+0x960, v SECOND from the CSE'd load -> v=v1/base=v0; CRITICAL: the threshold compare must read *(int*)(v+0x960) via v, not *base, or VN unifies it with the else-arm loads and kills the beqzl annulled dup-loads. Negative: if(1) barrier + base-first-with-*base-thr collapse the dups (20 diffs).
